message: This is RIDICULOUS, nothing works and I've been waiting 3 days!!!
note: EDGE CASE: angry/emotional tone. Expect High priority based on 'nothing works' + 3-day outage, not the tone.

message: broken
note: EDGE CASE: very short/vague message. Expect clarification_needed=true, Medium priority, no crash.

message: I was charged twice for my subscription this month and now I can't even log in to check my account or dispute it.
note: EDGE CASE: ambiguous, fits Billing & Payments and Account Access. Reasoning should justify the pick.

message: Our entire team can't access the production dashboard, it's been down for 45 minutes and we're losing sales in real time.
note: Known severity: HIGH -- outage, business-critical, no workaround.

message: Could you add a dark mode option to the mobile app? Would be a nice quality-of-life improvement.
note: Known severity: LOW -- feature request, nothing broken.

message: The export-to-CSV button on the reports page throws a 500 error every time I click it, but I can still export as PDF as a workaround.
note: Known severity: MEDIUM -- confirmed bug, workaround exists.

message: My card was charged $49.99 but I cancelled my plan two weeks ago. Please refund me.
note: Known severity: MEDIUM -- billing error, single user, no urgency beyond normal refund SLA.

message: URGENT: I think someone else logged into my account, there are login alerts from a country I've never been to.
How do I change the currency displayed on my invoices?
The mobile app crashes immediately on launch on my iPhone 15 after the latest update. Completely unusable.
Quick question - does your API support pagination on the /orders endpoint?
I've been on hold with billing for an hour and no one has picked up. I just want to know why my invoice doubled this month.
Feature suggestion: it would help a lot if we could bulk-export tickets instead of one at a time.
getting error code E4021 when trying to sync calendar, happens every time, tried reinstalling
not sure who to ask but is there a way to merge two duplicate customer records in the CRM?
wow
Whole system is down for our entire company, 200+ employees affected, this is costing us thousands per hour, please escalate immediately.
just wanted to say the new UI update looks great, nice work team
I forgot my password and the reset email never arrives, checked spam folder too.
Can I get a copy of last year's invoices for tax purposes? Not urgent, whenever you get a chance.
